title: Big Mom’s Broken Memory
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Big Mom, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Charlotte Linlin as Big Mom’s past explains the emotional weakness that the assassination plan tries to exploit.
scene: Big Mom’s childhood reveals the loss and confusion behind her obsession with Mother Carmel.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is the island where

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Long ago, big mom was...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that most famous race of giants, the "warriors of Elbaf," live.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Where are we?

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Charlotte Linlin 5-Year- Old Human

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Where are mommy and the others going?

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Daddy's got some work around here, Linlin.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will you be a good girl and wait for me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aww...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I WANNA GO TOO!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: In exchange, we'll let you eat

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As many candles from your knapsack as you want!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes! We will!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WhAA- AAAT?! @ All of Them?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I'll wait! I'll wait O I'm waiting!:)

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Noo... Linlin!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quit crying already! She caused so many casualties

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a miracle we were able to get away with just sending her out of the country! We can't deal with that child!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Holy Mother They say resides in these lands will surely save Linlin.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're setting off now! We can't stay in these dangerous waters for long!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Whoa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There's so many huge fish here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This is weird.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They're so late..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm hungry.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: PAPA! Mama!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One can scarcely speak of Elbaf without mentioning that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Some 100 years ago, the giant warriors that terrorized the world,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The "Giant soldier Pirate Crew," suddenly lost their two captains!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's a legend.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Not long after,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Having lost their leader, several stragglers of the crew let down their guard,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and were captured by the Marines. As they stood at the gallows,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A wandering, beautiful woman of the cloth appeared.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Stop!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The heavens cry for peace!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Her name was sister caramel.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The heavens?! The hell are you on about?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have you any idea terror these monsters have inflicted on this world?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All the more reason! Why do you not see it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At that very moment, dark clouds covered the sky.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If you kill these men,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Warriors of Elbaf will yet again take up arms!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: They will swear revenge against humanity!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Forgive their sins! I will lead them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Unto a world where the many peoples of this earth

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can join hands and smile together, as one!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: caramel eventually came to be called Holy Mother, or just mother,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and, with no regard for class or race,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: took in children that had nowhere else to go.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She opened a home called ''The Lamb's house.''

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Tea Party storyline with 52 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s past reframes her weakness and the emotional core of the failed assassination plan.
